headline: PNC Announces Redemption of 4.543% Senior Fixed Rate/Floating Rate Notes Due May 13, 2027
summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) today announced the redemption on May 13, 2026, of all outstanding 4.543% Senior Fixed Rate/Floating Rate Notes due May 13, 2027, in the amount of $1,250,000,000 (CUSIP 69353R FY9), issued by PNC Bank, National Association. The securities have an original scheduled maturity date of May 13, 2027. The redemption price will be equal to 100% of the principal amount, plus any accrued and unpaid interest to the redemption date of May 13, 2026. Interes
